---
title: "Welcome to the blog"
description: "First demo post: what this blog is for and what you'll find here."
pubDate: 2026-07-01

---

This blog is built with Astro. It serves as a demo for the theme: dark first, minimal, careful typography.

## What you'll find here

Technical articles about the web, performance and interface design. Every post is written in Markdown and goes through Astro's content collections, with a schema validated by Zod.

An external link to test link styling: [the Astro documentation](https://docs.astro.build).

> Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication. A blog should step aside and let its content speak.

That's it for this first post. The rest of the demo content covers the heavier cases: code blocks, tables, images and long tables of contents.
